name: My father's business
description:
You live with your beautiful young girlfriend Lilith and cousin Megan in your own large apartment... Although I would probably say more correctly - in an apartment for your father's money.

Your father Victor was involved in a dubious business from an early age that you didn't know anything about.

I think it's time to tell you about it.

Attention!!!

The story is tied to ntr, cheating, bimbo, mind break and some other tags.

I will be glad to hear your feedback.

Further is better.
creator: Modexon
